name: Shell Necklace
description: Necklace made with valuable shells. It presents a beauty different from gemstones.

name: High-quality Whale Baleen Fishing Gear
description: Fishing rod made with whale baleen. It features a light weight and elasticity.

name: Snake Shell Charm
description: A charm containing snake shells. It is said to help bring fortune.

name: Cat Whiskers Charm
description: A charm containing fallen cat whiskers. It is said to help bring fortune.

name: Meteorite Protective Talisman
description: A protective talisman made by processing a fallen stone from the sky.

name: Pendant of the Four Elements (Earth)
description: A pendant containing condensed elements of Earth, made through advanced alchemy.

name: Pendant of the Four Elements (Water)
description: A pendant containing condensed elements of Water, made through advanced alchemy.

name: Pendant of the Four Elements (Wind)
description: A pendant containing condensed elements of Wind, made through advanced alchemy.

name: Pendant of the Four Elements (Fire)
description: A pendant containing condensed elements of Fire, made through advanced alchemy.

name: Rudder Ribbon
description: Accessory modeled after an accessory worn by a woman who aims to become a seafarer.

name: Queen's Perfume Bottle
description: A crystal perfume bottle known as a favorite item of a certain noble queen. It's one of the gifts of human wisdom.

name: Ring of the Sun God Helios
description: A ring with the brilliance of the sun god Helios. The great heritage of mankind.

name: Chares' Architectural Technology Book
description: A technology book written by the architect who is believed to have constructed the Colossus of Rhodes.

name: Aurangzeb's Ring
description: The ring of Emperor Aurangzeb, which was robbed by the pirate Avery. It attracts people's hearts.

name: Hyakuman-Isshin Banner
description: A banner that has the maxim of Mohri Motonari, the daimyo of Japan, on it. It helps Sailors unite and improve the accuracy of their battle abilities.

name: Royal Easter Egg
description: The finest Easter egg made by order of a Russian emperor. It symbolizes the belief in the resurrection of God.

name: Guangfu Exhortation
description: An exhortation issued by Koxinga to counter the Qing emperor who puts pressure on maritime trading routes. It's appealing for the reconstruction of the Ming dynasty.

name: Zephyrus's Wind Bag
description: A leather bag containing the west wind god Zephyrus. It freely creates a tailwind to help the voyage.

name: Golden Arc
description: A storage box for holy relics made of gold plundered in the New World. It symbolizes both human greed and faith.

name: Pendant of Love
description: Pendant that frees the heart. *The 'Appeal' emote will change when equipped.

name: Hamaya of Diving Protection
description: A talisman arrow said to destroy and cleanse evil.

quest_sources.name: Legacy TH11. Monarch Favored by the Gods

name: Ring of Royalty
description: A beautifully engraved ring that's been passed down in a royal family.

quest_sources.name: Legacy TH11. Monarch Favored by the Gods

name: Custom Amber Ring
description: A ring inlaid with a beautiful amber. Its craft value is high.

quest_sources.name: Legacy TH12. A Ship on a Sea of Sand

name: Book of Spices
description: A book containing a wealth of information on various spices.

quest_sources.name: Legacy TH12. A Ship on a Sea of Sand

name: Mysterious Fragrant Wood
description: A fragrant tree with a unique aroma. Just by holding it, you will wear its sweet fragrance.

quest_sources.name: Legacy TH12. A Ship on a Sea of Sand

name: Commentariolus
description: A thesis written by Copernicus that serves as a template for the Copernican theory. Also called the 'Little Commentary'.

name: Opera di Bartolomeo
description: A cookbook written by the charismatic Renaissance chef, Scappi. In addition to recipes, cooking utensils are also recorded.

name: Biography of Admiral Nelson
description: A book written about the saga of Admiral Nelson, a hero of the English Navy.

name: Ancient Indian Sheet Music
description: A book containing ancient Indian musical notations.

quest_sources.name: Legacy TH13. Buddhist Deity with a Musical Instrument

name: Complete Works of Music
description: A book containing the study of music from ancient times to the present. A legacy brimming with the wisdom of mankind.

name: Dialogus de Systema Cosmicum
description: Galileo Galilei's book on the heliocentric theory, written in the form of a debate between three individuals.

name: The Lives
description: A series of artist biographies written by Vasari. Michelangelo is among the artists included.

name: The Doria's Talisman
description: A talisman engraved with the coat of arms of the prestigious Doria family of Genoa. The glory of the family shines brightly.
